## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (improvement with no user-facing change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore (internal maintenance, dependencies, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've run `npm run build` and `npm test` locally
- [ ] I've run `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` in `src-tauri/`
- [ ] I've run `cargo test` in `src-tauri/` (if Rust code changed)
- [ ] Tests are added/updated for logic changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] I've reviewed the code and it follows existing patterns
